svg.title: Day 7 — Claude Usage Strategy, ABTalks 60-Day AI Mastery Challenge, Hariprasath
svg.desc: All-in-one visual card covering Claude model selection, effort levels, daily workflow table, biggest mistakes, and final recommendation for Day 7
svg.text: Hariprasath · ECE Student · Daily Claude Power User
Final recommendation — one model, one effort
Sonnet 4.6 at Standard effort — 90% of the time.
Switch to High only for career plans, internships and pitches.
